hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and organizes wallet and transaction risk signals to help compliance teams triage high-risk alerts faster with clear workflows and audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Alert triage depends on manual prioritization
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to quickly identify which high-risk transaction alerts require immediate attention due to fragmented wallet screening results and scattered risk signals. This slows response times and weakens audit readiness for suspicious activity investigations across dispersed data sources.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links wallet screening outputs, transaction risk signals, and sanctions exposure into a unified alert triage workflow that routes high-risk alerts into evidence-backed, reviewable cases for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case review
workflow_description: SFTY connects wallet risk alerts through automated triage, case creation, reviewer assessment and evidence preservation to support faster compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. Structured alert triage
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented wallet and transaction alerts into a unified triage workflow that links risk signals, cases, evidence and decisions for clearer compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing complex alert prioritization with structured evidence, provider orchestration and controlled deployment for scalable compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts link to transaction and wallet risk cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-grade evidence for alerts

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects KYT, wallet risk, transaction monitoring, provider outputs and case management for regulated digital asset businesses and compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support high-risk alert triage?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction alerts, applies risk rules, routes high-risk cases for review, links alerts to customers and transactions, and supports efficient prioritization and escalation workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to support accurate, reviewable audit trails for internal and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational workflow without disrupting current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a control layer that structures outputs from your current providers into workflows, cases and reports without replacing underlying services.
final_title: Structure high-risk alert triage with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction alerts and case workflows into controlled, audit-ready compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
